LanguageData.PawnDiaryPersonalities123.Settings.Missi: 1-2-3 Personalities is not active, so this bridge does nothing right now. Enable 1-2-3 Personalities (M1) to use it.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryPersonalities123.Settings.Provi: Adds a short line about each colonist's Enneagram type (variant and main trait) to the context the diary sees when it writes. Read-only; nothing is changed in 1-2-3 Personalities.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryPersonalities123.Settings.UsePe: Lets each colonist's Enneagram type shape their diary outlook — what they notice, value, and fear — while keeping their own writing style. Turning this off clears the effect from every colonist. On by default.
